title: Borrowed Discipline

rules.name: Name the lane before the score
rules.source_practice: Verified or hard subsets are defined by explicit admission, filtering, timing, or division rules before results are claimed.
rules.adapted_holoverify_rule: Every HoloVerify packet must have a predeclared lane, selection rule, exclusion rule, and claim class before it can affect public wording.
allowed_wording: The current public denominator is blind-120 only.
This lane is hard-case/stress-selected under a disclosed 1-in-6 solo-failure admission rule.
Internal repair evidence is useful hardening evidence but not public FPR/FNR denominator evidence.
forbidden_wording: The stress-selected lane estimates natural population FPR/FNR.
The 300 packets extend blind-120 even though they were selected from known solo failures.
The old 614 result can be combined with blind-120.
required_evidence: Admission manifest with packet ids, lane labels, truth balance, domain tags, source pool, and inclusion/exclusion criteria
Freeze hash or root hash for the packet set
Runtime manifest showing truth-free packet ids and inputs
Scoring map hash preserved separately from runtime

rules.name: Show the spread, not only the average
rules.source_practice: Benchmarks expose resolved-instance matrices, scenario or time-window breakdowns, multi-metric grids, task-level success curves, repeated attempts, or separate accuracy and hallucination components.
rules.adapted_holoverify_rule: Report packet-level, sibling-level, and model-family-level inconsistency by lane; never let a single average hide wrong verdicts, parse failures, source failures, or quarantines.
allowed_wording: Each stress pair reports six solo opportunities and the HoloVerify result.
Wrong verdicts, parse/admissibility failures, source/evidence failures, and quarantines are distinct cells.
The lane average is shown together with the packet matrix and denominator.
forbidden_wording: Solo was X percent right, without showing which packets failed.
Parse failures are ignored because they are not wrong verdicts.
Only the aggregate score is needed.
required_evidence: Separate status codes for wrong verdict, parse/admissibility failure, source/evidence failure, quarantine, not run, and pass
Sibling-pair grouping and ALLOW/ESCALATE truth balance
Trace links or trace identifiers for each counted result

rules.name: Freeze construction rules and audit artifacts
rules.source_practice: Rules, release versions, reference implementations, scoring commands, prompt/completion artifacts, fixed seeds, replication requirements, and audits constrain result manipulation.
rules.adapted_holoverify_rule: A HoloVerify result receives public-denominator credit only if construction rules, runtime controls, scoring rules, and audit artifacts were frozen before score interpretation.
allowed_wording: Runtime inputs were truth-free and final scoring was trace-bound post-hoc.
Final wrong answers count as FP or FN after trace freeze.
Packet replacement or post-hoc lane movement invalidates public-denominator credit.
forbidden_wording: We repaired the prompt after seeing outcomes and kept the same denominator.
Known misses were excluded as unrepresentative after the run.
The scoring map was available to runtime gates.
required_evidence: Worker/Gov route or architecture version identifier
Predeclared scoring rules and FP/FN definitions
Audit log proving no answer-key access at runtime
Diff or version note for any prompt, gate, or scoring change

clean_public_lane_requirements: Admit 180 new blind packets before score interpretation
Balance the added packets as 90 ALLOW and 90 ESCALATE
Preserve sibling structure and domain tags
Publish all packet ids, freeze hashes, runtime manifests, scoring-map hashes, trace locations, quarantine rules, and FP/FN accounting
Do not publish blind-300 as the public denominator until the clean lane is complete
stress_lane_requirements: Disclose the 1-in-6 solo-failure admission rule before construction or publication
Report stress coverage and failure-seam evidence only
Do not call the lane a natural population FPR/FNR denominator
Do not combine the lane with blind-120 risk bounds

cherry_picking_or_score_inflation: Calling a 1-in-6 solo-failure-selected lane a natural FPR/FNR denominator
Disclosing stress selection only after observing favorable HoloVerify outcomes
Replacing, excluding, or moving misses after trace freeze
Combining blind-120 with old 614, V5/V6 repair evidence, canaries, or stress inventory
Hiding parse, admissibility, source, or evidence failures as harmless non-attempts
Reporting only an aggregate score when packet-level or model-level inconsistency exists
Changing prompts, deterministic gates, worker routes, scoring rules, or quarantine rules after outcomes are known without opening a new lane
Letting runtime inputs, Gov, deterministic gates, or final selection see ALLOW/ESCALATE truth
Publishing a public denominator without a manifest, root hash, trace map, scoring map, and quarantine log
